log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 44/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank --- HP: 44/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL! 6 psychic damage. HP: 172/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 172/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank HP: 17/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):14+4=18 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 39 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Tank HP: -22/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
